caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up in a bun wears black headphones and a black t-shirt while sitting in a recording studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone and is laughing and smiling throughout the clip. Behind her is a dark wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a screen displaying the name "Johnson" in red text. To her right, the text "BOSS TALK 101" appears on the screen along with a small microphone icon and the phrase "by 11 logo Studio." To her left, a circular logo says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." The woman's expression shifts from a wide, open-mouthed smile to a more subtle, closed-mouth grin as she continues to look toward someone off-screen. The background and equipment remain static while only her facial expressions and slight head movements change.
